title: São Bernardo do Campo、SP — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: São Bernardo do Campo、SPの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

São Bernardo do CampoはSPにある人口849,874の都市です。The heart of Brazil’s automotive industry in the ABC region, known for its industrial heritage and the Estância Park.
